equity.label: S&P 500 equity pressure
equity.note: Bigger equity drawdowns imply more stress.

rates.label: 2Y Treasury rate pressure
rates.note: Rates pressure reflects both the current 2Y level and any fresh 5-session rise.

inflation.label: Inflation expectations pressure
inflation.note: Inflation pressure reflects both the breakeven level and any fresh 5-session rise.

volatility.label: VIX volatility pressure
volatility.note: Higher implied volatility usually means greater market stress.

title: 2025-10-17 TACO Pressure Index Update: Low at 23.45
description: Today’s retreat-pressure snapshot for 2025-10-17: the TACO Pressure Index closed at 23.45/100, signaling a low pressure regime as volatility and equity stress shaped the daily read. Explore the score history, daily post, and the four-factor dashboard.
hero_summary: The daily signal helps separate noise from persistent multi-factor stress. On 2025-10-17, the score printed 23.45/100 in the low regime, with volatility and equity stress doing most of the work.
